metadata.description: EBR Agency's SEO plugin marketplace for Claude Code — a full-stack suite covering technical SEO, content engines, scaled reporting, link intelligence, local (GMB), answer-engine (AEO), and generative-engine (GEO) optimization.

plugins.name: seo-wave1
plugins.description: Automated SEO Wave 1 — technical auditing, on-page optimization, schema markup, and bulk Webflow updates. Uses Webflow MCP, Supabase MCP, and custom SEO analysis tools.

plugins.name: seo-wave2
plugins.description: SEO Wave 2 — Content Engine. Keyword research, content brief generation, AI content drafting, SEO scoring, and auto-publish to Webflow CMS. Works with Webflow, Supabase, Gmail, and Google Calendar MCPs.

plugins.name: seo-wave3
plugins.description: SEO Wave 3 — Scale & Report. Rank tracking, automated reporting, anomaly detection, outreach automation, and strategy recalibration. Works with Webflow, Supabase, Gmail, and Google Calendar MCPs.

plugins.name: seo-offpage
plugins.description: SEO Offpage — Link Intelligence & Authority Building. Backlink auditing, competitor backlink analysis, digital PR strategy, unlinked mention discovery, and link intersection analysis. Works with Webflow, Supabase, Gmail, and Google Calendar MCPs.

plugins.name: seo-gmb
plugins.description: Google Business Profile (GMB) optimization. Automated profile auditing, post scheduling, review management, citation consistency, local schema markup, and local ranking tracking. Works with Supabase, Gmail, and Google Calendar MCPs.

plugins.name: seo-aeo
plugins.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO). Optimize content to be cited by AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini). Featured snippet targeting, answer-first content structuring, AI citation tracking, and E-E-A-T signal enhancement.

plugins.name: seo-geo
plugins.description: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). Optimize digital presence for AI-powered generative search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Mode). Semantic footprint expansion, citation-ready content, brand authority building, AI crawler access, and Share of Model tracking.
